step_description: Application exception logs and connection pool stats from Splunk MCP
rows: Timeout expired obtaining connection from pool after 15000ms
java.sql.SQLTimeoutException: Operation timed out on lock query
narrative_hint: [DEMO CONTEXT] Splunk logs reveal massive application-level connection pool starvation (412 connection errors). Web servers are unable to acquire connections because DB transactions are running slowly due to host-level disk I/O queue backlog. This correlates database waits with app server exceptions.
